title: Quantum Advantage: Foundations and Complexity
description: Rigorous exploration of quantum computational advantage, including complexity-theoretic foundations, types of speedups, and the evidence for quantum supremacy in various computational models.
learningObjectives: Define quantum advantage and distinguish between its various forms
Understand the complexity-theoretic evidence for quantum speedups
Analyze the relationship between BQP and classical complexity classes
Evaluate claims of quantum advantage using rigorous criteria
Implement verification protocols for quantum computational claims
